items.title: Three arrested in Paris after attempted bomb attack outside Bank of America
items.dek: France's anti-terrorism prosecutor's office said it had immediately taken over the investigation.
items.body: France's anti-terrorism prosecutor's office said it had immediately taken over the investigation.

items.title: Two Australian states offer free public transport as war pushes up fuel prices
items.dek: Victoria and Tasmania incentivise commuters not to drive as the Iran war causes the price of petrol to shoot up.
items.body: Victoria and Tasmania incentivise commuters not to drive as the Iran war causes the price of petrol to shoot up.
items.author: IriLine Desk
